positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric depiction of a forest of towering stylized trees and celestial bodies. The primary subject is a symmetrical arrangement of stylized mountains and abstracted flora. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, teal, burnt orange, and cream, maintaining strong silhouettes against a gradient background. The style should be inspired by modern retro-futuristic vector art, emphasizing clean lines, repeating patterns, and strong, graphic contrast. The composition must be centered, highly detailed, and entirely suitable for printing on apparel. Clean, thick lines, flat graphic design, negative space usage, high contrast, symmetry.
